entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Workflow Trigger Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE WorkflowLaunch PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <WorkflowLaunch status="failed" workflowName="HR Source Joiner event LCM WorkFlow ref" workflowRef="HR Source Joiner event LCM WorkFlow ref"> <Messages> <Message key="Exception occurred while executing the RPCRequest: Errors returned from IQService. "The object already exists. The object already exists. 00000524: UpdErr: DSID-031A1261, problem 6005 (ENTRY_EXISTS), data 0 00000524: UpdErr: DSID-031A1261, problem 6005 (ENTRY_EXISTS), data 0 . HRESULT:[0x80071392] For identity: CN=Sathish Dhawan,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"" type="Error"/> </Messages> <TaskResultRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.TaskResult" id="HR Source Joiner event LCM WorkFlow ref" name="HR Source Joiner event LCM WorkFlow ref"/> </TaskResultRef> <WorkflowCaseRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.WorkflowCase" id="c0a81d89902f16358190351e865e07cd" name="HR Source Joiner event LCM WorkFlow ref"/> </WorkflowCaseRef> </WorkflowLaunch>
